channel.title: Short-form on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Short-form on Tech Tracker

item.title: fw.tv - create short-form videos and rank them on Google News.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-9FqnxIcJlaw/Yg6DOYb5DjI/AAAAAAAAJOo/xL9O-uYMUYIDSkogJF06AbM25-vx9PnawCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1645118260465694-0.png" alt=""> Usually, people create short form videos for YouTube shorts or TikTok kinda apps, but they won’t get ranked on google search engine even if ranked somehow on Google search still they won’t be listed on Google news as Google won’t consider them as stories, most bloggers know and create stories with images to rank on Google, however Google even started ranking Short-form videos. There are very few platforms available on Internet where you can create short-form videos and rank them on Google, but not everyone know about them as now a days image stories are popular among bloggers, anyhow if you’re interested to create short form videos and rank them on Google then you may use fw.
